title: rubus hirtus var. braunii
intro: Rubus hirtus var. braunii, also known as the Bramble, is a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties also make it beneficial for reducing fever, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. Rubus hirtus var. braunii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use, allowing individuals to harness its health benefits in a variety of ways.
